stories.title: Hide Task Auto-Sync, Smart Listening, and Proactive Agent from Settings
acceptance: Task Auto-Sync removed from allSettingsSections in Settings.tsx
Smart Listening removed from allSettingsSections in Settings.tsx
Proactive Agent removed from allSettingsSections in Settings.tsx
Routes commented out or removed in App.tsx
No dead links in settings sidebar
Typecheck passes
stories.notes: Remove/comment the nav items from allSettingsSections array and the routes from App.tsx

stories.title: Fix Off-Centre Dialogs in Settings
acceptance: EmailTrainingWizard DialogContent has proper centering
Other settings dialogs checked for centering issues
Dialogs render below fixed top bar (not behind it)
Typecheck passes
stories.notes: Check DialogContent centering. May need to add top-offset class per CLAUDE.md SheetContent rule.

stories.title: Verify and Fix Follow Up Configuration Workflows
acceptance: Add Default Workflows seeds 3 default workflows
Workflows can be edited and saved
Workflows can be deleted
Workflows persist after page refresh
Typecheck passes
stories.notes: Investigate the OrgProposalWorkflowService CRUD. May already work — verify code path end-to-end.

stories.title: Fix Google Workspace Service Toggle Persistence
acceptance: Toggling OFF a service and Save persists the change to DB
Page reload shows correct toggle state
service_preferences column exists on google_integrations
Typecheck passes
stories.notes: Check if service_preferences JSONB column exists. If null defaults all to true, fix the save path.

stories.title: Fix Email Sync Button
acceptance: Sync Emails button triggers sync process
Progress indicator shows during sync
Emails Synced count updates after completion
If Google not connected, button disabled with message
Error states handled with toast feedback
Typecheck passes
stories.notes: Check if emailSyncService calls an edge function. Verify Google connection prerequisite.

stories.title: Fix Organization Invitation Role Assignment
acceptance: Member role saves as 'member' in organization_invitations table
Admin role saves as 'admin' in organization_invitations table
Invitations list displays correct role per invite
Role dropdown value passed through full chain: UI → service → DB
Typecheck passes
stories.notes: Trace role param from UI dropdown through handleSendInvite → createInvitation → DB insert

stories.title: Fix Organization Invitation Email Delivery
acceptance: Admin and Member invites both trigger email delivery
send-router edge function handles organization_invitation type
Clear error message when email delivery fails
Typecheck passes
stories.notes: Investigate send-router for invitation email handler. Check if Encharge/email provider is wired.
